items.caption: A black long-sleeved shirt displayed on a mannequin against a wooden background. the shirt features a graphic design with a blue and white color scheme. the design includes a stylized depiction of a truck, which appears to be a tractor, and a banner with text that reads, "i don't always fill out a logbook, but when i do, it's probably made up." the text is in a playful, casual font that complements the overall aesthetic of the design. the shirt is likely intended for individuals who work in the trucking or logging industry, as suggested by the tractor design and the humorous take on logbook regulations.
